<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>Axon - Your LLM's LLM</title>
  <meta name="description" content="Axon is a Recursive Language Model engine built in Rust. When your LLM runs out of context, it spawns a child. That child can spawn another. Turtles all the way down." />

  <!-- Canonical -->
  <link rel="canonical" href="https://axon.dio.computer" />

  <!-- Open Graph (Facebook, Discord, LinkedIn, Slack) -->
  <meta property="og:type"        content="website" />
  <meta property="og:url"         content="https://axon.dio.computer" />
  <meta property="og:site_name"   content="Axon" />
  <meta property="og:title"       content="Axon - Your LLM's LLM" />
  <meta property="og:description" content="A Recursive Language Model engine built in Rust. When your LLM runs out of context, it spawns a child agent with its own sandbox. That child can spawn another. Turtles all the way down." />
  <meta property="og:image"       content="https://axon.dio.computer/og-image.png" />
  <meta property="og:image:type"  content="image/png" />
  <meta property="og:image:width" content="1200" />
  <meta property="og:image:height" content="630" />
  <meta property="og:image:alt"   content="Axon - We need to go deeper. Your LLM's LLM." />

  <!-- Twitter / X Card -->
  <meta name="twitter:card"        content="summary_large_image" />
  <meta name="twitter:title"       content="Axon - Your LLM's LLM" />
  <meta name="twitter:description" content="A Recursive Language Model engine built in Rust. Sandboxed Python REPL at every depth. Multi-provider. Open source." />
  <meta name="twitter:image"       content="https://axon.dio.computer/og-image.png" />
  <meta name="twitter:image:alt"   content="Axon - We need to go deeper. Your LLM's LLM." />

  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@400;500;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;0,700;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />

  <style>
    /* ─── Design tokens ──────────────────────────────────── */
    :root {
      --bg:         #080808;
      --surface:    #111111;
      --surface-2:  #191919;
      --border:     #242424;
      --border-hi:  #3a3a3a;
      --text:       #f0ece2;
      --muted:      #666666;
      --muted-2:    #444444;
      --amber:      #f5a623;
      --amber-dim:  #c4831a;
      --cyan:       #00bfff;
      --rust:       #c65b2b;
      --green:      #4caf74;
      --red:        #e84855;
      --font-sans:  'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif;
      --font-mono:  'JetBrains Mono', 'Courier New', monospace;
    }

    /* ─── Reset ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; font-size: 16px; }
    body {
      background: var(--bg);
      color: var(--text);
      font-family: var(--font-sans);
      line-height: 1.65;
      overflow-x: hidden;
    }
    a { color: inherit; text-decoration: none; }
    img, svg { display: block; max-width: 100%; }

    /* ─── Utility ────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .mono { font-family: var(--font-mono); }
    .amber { color: var(--amber); }
    .cyan  { color: var(--cyan); }
    .green { color: var(--green); }
    .rust  { color: var(--rust); }
    .muted { color: var(--muted); }
    .label {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.12em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    /* ─── Nav ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    nav {
      position: fixed;
      top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
      z-index: 100;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 0 2.5rem;
      height: 60px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      background: rgba(8, 8, 8, 0.92);
      backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
    }
    .nav-logo {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 1.15rem;
      color: var(--amber);
      letter-spacing: -0.02em;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.5rem;
    }
    .nav-logo-dot {
      width: 8px; height: 8px;
      background: var(--amber);
      border-radius: 50%;
      animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    @keyframes pulse {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
      50% { opacity: 0.3; }
    }
    .nav-links {
      display: flex;
      gap: 2rem;
      list-style: none;
      font-size: 0.875rem;
      font-weight: 500;
    }
    .nav-links a {
      color: var(--muted);
      transition: color 0.15s;
    }
    .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--text); }
    .nav-cta {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      padding: 0.45rem 1rem;
      border: 1.5px solid var(--amber);
      color: var(--amber);
      transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s;
    }
    .nav-cta:hover {
      background: var(--amber);
      color: var(--bg);
    }

    /* ─── Hero ───────────────────────────────────────────── */
    #hero {
      min-height: 100vh;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      padding: 8rem 2.5rem 5rem;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .hero-grid-bg {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background-image:
        linear-gradient(var(--border) 1px, transparent 1px),
        linear-gradient(90deg, var(--border) 1px, transparent 1px);
      background-size: 40px 40px;
      opacity: 0.35;
      mask-image: radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 70% at 50% 50%, black 30%, transparent 100%);
      -webkit-mask-image: radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 70% at 50% 50%, black 30%, transparent 100%);
    }
    .hero-inner {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 1;
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 5rem;
      max-width: 1200px;
      width: 100%;
      align-items: center;
    }
    .hero-text {}
    .hero-badge {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.5rem;
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      color: var(--rust);
      border: 1px solid var(--rust);
      padding: 0.25rem 0.7rem;
      margin-bottom: 1.75rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    }
    .hero-badge::before {
      content: '';
      width: 6px; height: 6px;
      background: var(--rust);
      border-radius: 50%;
    }
    .hero-h1 {
      font-size: clamp(3rem, 6vw, 5.5rem);
      font-weight: 700;
      line-height: 1.05;
      letter-spacing: -0.03em;
      margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    }
    .hero-h1 span { color: var(--amber); }
    .hero-tagline {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 1.1rem;
      color: var(--cyan);
      margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
      letter-spacing: -0.01em;
    }
    .hero-desc {
      font-size: 1.05rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      max-width: 480px;
      margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
      line-height: 1.75;
    }
    .hero-desc strong { color: var(--text); font-weight: 600; }
    .hero-actions {
      display: flex;
      gap: 1rem;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
    .btn-primary {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.5rem;
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 0.875rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      background: var(--amber);
      color: #080808;
      padding: 0.8rem 1.75rem;
      transition: background 0.15s;
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
    }
    .btn-primary:hover { background: #ffba3f; }
    .btn-secondary {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.5rem;
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 0.875rem;
      font-weight: 500;
      border: 1.5px solid var(--border-hi);
      color: var(--muted);
      padding: 0.8rem 1.75rem;
      transition: border-color 0.15s, color 0.15s;
    }
    .btn-secondary:hover { border-color: var(--text); color: var(--text); }
    .hero-stats {
      display: flex;
      gap: 2rem;
      margin-top: 3.5rem;
      padding-top: 2rem;
      border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .stat-item {}
    .stat-number {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 1.6rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--text);
      line-height: 1;
    }
    .stat-label {
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      margin-top: 0.25rem;
    }

    /* Terminal */
    .hero-terminal {
      background: var(--surface);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      line-height: 1.7;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .terminal-bar {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.4rem;
      padding: 0.6rem 1rem;
      background: var(--surface-2);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .terminal-dot {
      width: 10px; height: 10px;
      border-radius: 50%;
    }
    .dot-red { background: #e84855; }
    .dot-amber { background: #f5a623; }
    .dot-green { background: #4caf74; }
    .terminal-title {
      margin-left: auto;
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      color: var(--muted);
    }
    .terminal-body {
      padding: 1.25rem 1.25rem;
      min-height: 320px;
    }
    .t-line { display: block; white-space: pre; }
    .t-cmd    { color: var(--text); }
    .t-prompt { color: var(--amber); }
    .t-d0     { color: var(--cyan); }
    .t-d1     { color: #74b9ff; }
    .t-d2     { color: #a29bfe; }
    .t-final  { color: var(--green); }
    .t-stats  { color: var(--muted); }
    .t-spawn  { color: var(--amber); }
    .t-blank  { color: transparent; user-select: none; }
    .cursor {
      display: inline-block;
      width: 7px; height: 1em;
      background: var(--amber);
      vertical-align: text-bottom;
      animation: blink 1s step-end infinite;
    }
    @keyframes blink {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
      50% { opacity: 0; }
    }

    /* ─── Section base ───────────────────────────────────── */
    section { padding: 6rem 2.5rem; }
    .section-inner {
      max-width: 1200px;
      margin: 0 auto;
    }
    .section-header {
      margin-bottom: 4rem;
    }
    .section-header h2 {
      font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem);
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: -0.03em;
      line-height: 1.1;
      margin-top: 0.75rem;
    }
    .section-header p {
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 1.05rem;
      max-width: 560px;
      margin-top: 1rem;
      line-height: 1.75;
    }

    /* ─── Problem ────────────────────────────────────────── */
    #problem {
      background: var(--surface);
      border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .problem-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 4rem;
      align-items: center;
    }
    .problem-text h2 {
      font-size: clamp(2rem, 3.5vw, 2.75rem);
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: -0.03em;
      line-height: 1.15;
      margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    }
    .problem-text h2 span { color: var(--amber); }
    .problem-text p {
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 1rem;
      line-height: 1.8;
      margin-bottom: 1rem;
    }
    .problem-text p strong { color: var(--text); }
    .context-meter {
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .context-meter-header {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
      background: var(--surface-2);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      color: var(--muted);
    }
    .context-bar-wrap {
      padding: 1.5rem 1rem;
    }
    .context-bar-label {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
    }
    .context-bar {
      height: 24px;
      background: var(--surface-2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      margin-bottom: 1rem;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .context-bar-fill {
      height: 100%;
      transition: width 1s ease;
    }
    .bar-safe { background: var(--green); }
    .bar-warn { background: var(--amber); }
    .bar-dead { background: var(--red); }
    .context-bar-text {
      position: absolute;
      right: 0.5rem;
      top: 50%;
      transform: translateY(-50%);
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      color: var(--bg);
      font-weight: 700;
    }
    .context-vs {
      padding: 1rem;
      border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 0.75rem;
    }
    .vs-row {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 0.3rem 0;
      color: var(--muted);
    }
    .vs-row .win { color: var(--green); }
    .vs-row .lose { color: var(--red); }

    /* ─── How it works ───────────────────────────────────── */
    #how {
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .how-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.2fr;
      gap: 5rem;
      align-items: start;
    }
    .how-steps {}
    .step {
      display: flex;
      gap: 1.25rem;
      margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateX(-20px);
      transition: opacity 0.5s ease, transform 0.5s ease;
    }
    .step.visible {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateX(0);
    }
    .step-num {
      flex-shrink: 0;
      width: 32px; height: 32px;
      border: 1.5px solid var(--amber);
      color: var(--amber);
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      margin-top: 0.1rem;
    }
    .step-content h3 {
      font-size: 1.1rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
    }
    .step-content p { color: var(--muted); font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.7; }
    .step-content p strong { color: var(--text); }
    .step-content code {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      background: var(--surface-2);
      padding: 0.1rem 0.4rem;
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      color: var(--cyan);
    }

    /* Recursion diagram */
    .recursion-diagram {
      position: relative;
    }
    .rdepth {
      border: 1.5px solid;
      padding: 1.25rem;
      position: relative;
      opacity: 0;
      transition: opacity 0.6s ease;
    }
    .rdepth.visible { opacity: 1; }
    .rdepth-0 {
      border-color: var(--cyan);
      background: rgba(0, 191, 255, 0.03);
    }
    .rdepth-1 {
      border-color: #74b9ff;
      background: rgba(116, 185, 255, 0.03);
      margin: 1rem 0 0 0;
    }
    .rdepth-2 {
      border-color: #a29bfe;
      background: rgba(162, 155, 254, 0.04);
      margin: 1rem 0 0 0;
    }
    .rdepth-label {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 0.68rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.5rem;
    }
    .depth-0-label { color: var(--cyan); }
    .depth-1-label { color: #74b9ff; }
    .depth-2-label { color: #a29bfe; }
    .rdepth-badge {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 0.6rem;
      padding: 0.1rem 0.5rem;
      border: 1px solid currentColor;
      opacity: 0.6;
    }
    .rdepth-pills {
      display: flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 0.5rem;
      margin-top: 0.75rem;
    }
    .pill {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      padding: 0.2rem 0.6rem;
      background: var(--surface-2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      color: var(--muted);
    }
    .pill.active { color: var(--green); border-color: var(--green); background: rgba(76, 175, 116, 0.08); }
    .arrow-down {
      text-align: center;
      color: var(--muted-2);
      font-size: 1.2rem;
      padding: 0.25rem 0;
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
    }
    .spawn-label {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      color: var(--amber);
      text-align: center;
      display: block;
      letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    }

    /* ─── Features ───────────────────────────────────────── */
    #features {
      background: var(--surface);
      border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .features-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
      gap: 1px;
      background: var(--border);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .feature-card {
      background: var(--surface);
      padding: 2rem;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
      transition: background 0.2s;
    }
    .feature-card:hover { background: var(--surface-2); }
    .feature-icon {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 1.4rem;
      margin-bottom: 1rem;
      line-height: 1;
    }
    .feature-card h3 {
      font-size: 1.05rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
      line-height: 1.3;
    }
    .feature-card p {
      font-size: 0.875rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      line-height: 1.7;
    }
    .feature-card p strong { color: var(--text); font-weight: 500; }
    .feature-tag {
      margin-top: 1rem;
      display: inline-block;
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 0.62rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.08em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--muted-2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      padding: 0.15rem 0.5rem;
    }

    /* ─── Benchmarks ─────────────────────────────────────── */
    #benchmarks {
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .bench-intro {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      margin-top: 1rem;
      font-style: italic;
    }
    .bench-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 2rem;
    }
    .bench-card {
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      background: var(--surface);
    }
    .bench-card-head {
      padding: 1rem 1.25rem;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
    }
    .bench-card-title {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--text);
    }
    .bench-card-n {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      color: var(--muted);
    }
    .bench-card-body { padding: 1.25rem; }
    .bench-row {
      margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
    }
    .bench-row:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }
    .bench-row-header {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
    }
    .bench-mode {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      color: var(--muted);
    }
    .bench-pct {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--text);
    }
    .bench-bar-track {
      height: 10px;
      background: var(--surface-2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .bench-bar-fill {
      height: 100%;
      transition: width 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
      width: 0;
    }
    .bar-amber { background: var(--amber); }
    .bar-cyan  { background: var(--cyan); }
    .bar-green { background: var(--green); }
    .bar-rust  { background: var(--rust); }
    .ci-note {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 0.62rem;
      color: var(--muted-2);
      margin-top: 0.3rem;
    }
    .bench-insight {
      margin-top: 2.5rem;
      padding: 1.5rem;
      border: 1px solid var(--amber);
      background: rgba(245, 166, 35, 0.04);
      display: flex;
      gap: 1rem;
    }
    .insight-icon {
      font-size: 1.2rem;
      flex-shrink: 0;
      margin-top: 0.1rem;
    }
    .insight-text {
      font-size: 0.875rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      line-height: 1.7;
    }
    .insight-text strong { color: var(--text); }

    /* ─── Providers ──────────────────────────────────────── */
    #providers {
      background: var(--surface);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .providers-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(6, 1fr);
      gap: 1px;
      background: var(--border);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      margin-top: 3rem;
    }
    .provider-card {
      background: var(--surface);
      padding: 1.5rem 1rem;
      text-align: center;
      transition: background 0.2s;
    }
    .provider-card:hover { background: var(--surface-2); }
    .provider-name {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--text);
      display: block;
      margin-top: 0.5rem;
    }
    .provider-models {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 0.6rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      display: block;
      margin-top: 0.2rem;
    }
    .provider-glyph {
      font-size: 1.5rem;
      line-height: 1;
    }

    /* ─── Quick start ────────────────────────────────────── */
    #start {
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .start-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.4fr;
      gap: 5rem;
      align-items: start;
    }
    .start-text h2 {
      font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 3vw, 2.5rem);
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: -0.03em;
      margin-top: 0.75rem;
      margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
    }
    .start-text p {
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 0.95rem;
      line-height: 1.75;
      margin-bottom: 1rem;
    }
    .code-block {
      background: var(--surface);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .code-block-header {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      padding: 0.6rem 1rem;
      background: var(--surface-2);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .code-block-lang {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--muted);
    }
    .code-block-copy {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      cursor: pointer;
      border: none;
      background: none;
      transition: color 0.15s;
      letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    }
    .code-block-copy:hover { color: var(--text); }
    .code-block pre {
      padding: 1.25rem;
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      line-height: 1.8;
      overflow-x: auto;
      color: var(--text);
    }
    .code-block pre .kw  { color: var(--amber); }
    .code-block pre .str { color: var(--green); }
    .code-block pre .cmt { color: var(--muted); font-style: italic; }
    .code-block pre .flag { color: var(--cyan); }
    .code-block pre .val  { color: #a29bfe; }
    .code-tabs {
      display: flex;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .code-tab {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
      cursor: pointer;
      color: var(--muted);
      border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-bottom: 2px solid transparent;
      transition: color 0.15s;
    }
    .code-tab.active {
      color: var(--amber);
      border-bottom-color: var(--amber);
      background: rgba(245, 166, 35, 0.04);
    }
    .code-pane { display: none; }
    .code-pane.active { display: block; }

    /* ─── Quote ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
    #quote {
      background: var(--surface);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      text-align: center;
    }
    .quote-text {
      font-size: clamp(1.3rem, 2.5vw, 2rem);
      font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: -0.02em;
      line-height: 1.4;
      max-width: 700px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      color: var(--text);
    }
    .quote-text em { color: var(--amber); font-style: normal; }
    .quote-attr {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      margin-top: 1.5rem;
    }

    /* ─── Footer ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
    footer {
      padding: 3rem 2.5rem;
      border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .footer-inner {
      max-width: 1200px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 1.5rem;
    }
    .footer-logo {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 1.1rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--amber);
    }
    .footer-byline {
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      margin-top: 0.25rem;
    }
    .footer-links {
      display: flex;
      gap: 1.5rem;
      list-style: none;
      font-size: 0.8rem;
    }
    .footer-links a {
      color: var(--muted);
      transition: color 0.15s;
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
    }
    .footer-links a:hover { color: var(--text); }
    .footer-rust {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      color: var(--rust);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.4rem;
    }

    /* ─── Scroll reveal ──────────────────────────────────── */
    .reveal {
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(16px);
      transition: opacity 0.5s ease, transform 0.5s ease;
    }
    .reveal.visible {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateY(0);
    }
    .reveal-delay-1 { transition-delay: 0.1s; }
    .reveal-delay-2 { transition-delay: 0.2s; }
    .reveal-delay-3 { transition-delay: 0.3s; }

    /* ─── Responsive ─────────────────────────────────────── */
    @media (max-width: 900px) {
      .hero-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 3rem; }
      .hero-h1 { font-size: 2.8rem; }
      .problem-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .how-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .features-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
      .bench-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .start-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 3rem; }
      .providers-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); }
      nav { padding: 0 1.25rem; }
      section { padding: 4rem 1.25rem; }
    }
    @media (max-width: 600px) {
      .features-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .providers-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
      .nav-links { display: none; }
      .hero-stats { flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 1.5rem; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ─── Nav ──────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<nav>
  <a href="#" class="nav-logo">
    <span class="nav-logo-dot"></span>
    axon
  </a>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#how">How it works</a></li>
    <li><a href="#features">Features</a></li>
    <li><a href="#benchmarks">Benchmarks</a></li>
    <li><a href="#start">Quick start</a></li>
    <li><a href="changelog.html">Changelog</a></li>
    <li><a href="/paper.pdf" target="_blank">Paper</a></li>
  </ul>
  <a href="https://github.com/Diogenesoftoronto/axon" class="nav-cta">GitHub ↗</a>
</nav>


<!-- ─── Hero ─────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<section id="hero">
  <div class="hero-grid-bg"></div>
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <div class="hero-text">
      <div class="hero-badge">Built in Rust · Recursive LLM Engine · Open Source</div>
      <h1 class="hero-h1">We need to<br><span>go deeper.</span></h1>
      <p class="hero-tagline">// Your LLM's LLM.</p>
      <p class="hero-desc">
        Axon is a <strong>Recursive Language Model engine</strong>. When your LLM runs out of context,
        it spawns a child agent with its own isolated sandbox. That child can spawn another.
        <strong>Turtles all the way down</strong> - until you have your answer.
      </p>
      <div class="hero-actions">
        <a href="#start" class="btn-primary">Get started →</a>
        <a href="/paper.pdf" download class="btn-secondary">📄 Paper (PDF)</a>
        <a href="#benchmarks" class="btn-secondary">View benchmarks</a>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-stats">
        <div class="stat-item">
          <div class="stat-number amber">∞</div>
          <div class="stat-label">recursion depth</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-item">
          <div class="stat-number">6</div>
          <div class="stat-label">LLM providers</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-item">
          <div class="stat-number">12<span class="muted" style="font-size:1rem">+</span></div>
          <div class="stat-label">benchmark suites</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-item">
          <div class="stat-number rust">🦀</div>
          <div class="stat-label">written in Rust</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-terminal">
      <div class="terminal-bar">
        <span class="terminal-dot dot-red"></span>
        <span class="terminal-dot dot-amber"></span>
        <span class="terminal-dot dot-green"></span>
        <span class="terminal-title">axon · depth=3 · claude-sonnet-4</span>
      </div>
      <div class="terminal-body" id="terminal-body">
        <span class="cursor" id="terminal-cursor"></span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>


<!-- ─── Problem ───────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<section id="problem">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="problem-grid">
      <div class="problem-text reveal">
        <span class="label">The problem</span>
        <h2>Context windows<br>are <span>a lie.</span></h2>
        <p>
          128K tokens sounds like a lot. Until you need to analyze a 200-page document,
          track 50 steps of state, or recursively decompose a hard planning problem.
        </p>
        <p>
          Suddenly you're <strong>truncating, chunking manually, and hallucinating</strong>
          the parts that didn't fit. The model runs out of brain.
        </p>
        <p>
          Axon gives it more. When context overflows, the model calls <code>llm_query()</code>
          and a fresh sub-agent spawns with its own workspace. Divide. Delegate. Conquer.
        </p>
      </div>
      <div class="reveal reveal-delay-1">
        <div class="context-meter">
          <div class="context-meter-header">
            <span>context_window.monitor</span>
            <span class="amber">● LIVE</span>
          </div>
          <div class="context-bar-wrap">
            <div class="context-bar-label">Without recursion — context stuffing</div>
            <div class="context-bar">
              <div class="context-bar-fill bar-dead" style="width:98%" id="bar-no-rec"></div>
              <span class="context-bar-text">127,847 / 128K</span>
            </div>
            <div class="context-bar-label" style="color: var(--red)">⚠ truncated · quality collapse · hallucination risk</div>

            <div style="margin-top: 1.5rem;" class="context-bar-label">With Axon — recursive delegation</div>
            <div class="context-bar">
              <div class="context-bar-fill bar-green" style="width:28%" id="bar-rec-root"></div>
              <span class="context-bar-text" style="color:var(--bg)">depth:0 · 35K</span>
            </div>
            <div class="context-bar" style="margin-top:0.4rem">
              <div class="context-bar-fill bar-safe" style="width:22%"></div>
              <span class="context-bar-text" style="color:var(--bg)">depth:1 · 28K</span>
            </div>
            <div class="context-bar" style="margin-top:0.4rem">
              <div class="context-bar-fill bar-safe" style="width:18%"></div>
              <span class="context-bar-text" style="color:var(--bg)">depth:2 · 22K</span>
            </div>
            <div class="context-bar-label" style="color: var(--green); margin-top: 0.3rem">✓ each agent focused · full precision · no truncation</div>
          </div>
          <div class="context-vs">
            <div class="vs-row">
              <span>Quality on hard reasoning tasks</span>
              <span><span class="lose">50%</span> → <span class="win">100%</span></span>
            </div>
            <div class="vs-row">
              <span>Long-context extraction</span>
              <span><span class="lose">fails</span> → <span class="win">works</span></span>
            </div>
            <div class="vs-row">
              <span>Hallucination risk</span>
              <span><span class="lose">high</span> → <span class="win">guarded</span></span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>


<!-- ─── How it works ──────────────────────────────────────── -->
<section id="how">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-header">
      <span class="label">Architecture</span>
      <h2>Strange loops,<br>all the way down.</h2>
      <p>
        Axon implements true recursive LLM execution. Each depth level is a complete agent
        with its own Python sandbox — not a prompt chain. Not a tool call. A <em>full sub-brain</em>.
      </p>
    </div>
    <div class="how-grid">
      <div class="how-steps">
        <div class="step" id="step-1">
          <div class="step-num">01</div>
          <div class="step-content">
            <h3>Root RLM receives the task</h3>
            <p>At <strong>depth:0</strong>, the engine spawns a Python REPL sandbox. The model can write
            code, introspect the context, and decide whether it needs help — or can go solo.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="step" id="step-2">
          <div class="step-num">02</div>
          <div class="step-content">
            <h3>Delegate to a sub-agent</h3>
            <p>When the model needs deeper reasoning, it calls <code>llm_query(chunk)</code>.
            Axon spawns a <strong>full child RLM at depth:1</strong> with an isolated sandbox.
            The parent waits. The child thinks.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="step" id="step-3">
          <div class="step-num">03</div>
          <div class="step-content">
            <h3>Recurse as deep as needed</h3>
            <p>Each child can spawn its own children, down to <code>--max-depth</code>.
            At the leaf level, calls hit the LLM directly. <strong>Divide. Delegate. Conquer.</strong>
            Results bubble back up the chain.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="step" id="step-4">
          <div class="step-num">04</div>
          <div class="step-content">
            <h3>Aggregate and surface FINAL()</h3>
            <p>The root RLM collects sub-agent results, runs aggregation logic in its sandbox,
            and calls <code>FINAL(answer)</code>. You get one clean answer. No assembly required.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="recursion-diagram" id="rdepth-container">
        <div class="rdepth rdepth-0" id="rd0">
          <div class="rdepth-label depth-0-label">
            <span>RLM · depth:0</span>
            <span class="rdepth-badge">root</span>
          </div>
          <p style="font-size:0.78rem; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom:0.75rem">
            Orchestrator. Analyzes query, delegates chunks, aggregates results.
          </p>
          <div class="rdepth-pills">
            <span class="pill active">Python REPL</span>
            <span class="pill active">llm_query()</span>
            <span class="pill">FINAL()</span>
            <span class="pill">VFS /plans/</span>
            <span class="pill">CHECKPOINT</span>
          </div>

          <div class="arrow-down">↓</div>
          <div class="spawn-label">spawns ↓</div>

          <div class="rdepth rdepth-1" id="rd1">
            <div class="rdepth-label depth-1-label">
              <span>RLM · depth:1</span>
              <span class="rdepth-badge">sub-agent</span>
            </div>
            <p style="font-size:0.78rem; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom:0.75rem">
              Focused analyzer. Processes a context chunk. Can recurse further.
            </p>
            <div class="rdepth-pills">
              <span class="pill active">Python REPL</span>
              <span class="pill active">llm_query()</span>
              <span class="pill active">FINAL()</span>
              <span class="pill">VFS /evidence/</span>
            </div>

            <div class="arrow-down">↓</div>
            <div class="spawn-label">spawns ↓</div>

            <div class="rdepth rdepth-2" id="rd2">
              <div class="rdepth-label depth-2-label">
                <span>RLM · depth:2</span>
                <span class="rdepth-badge">leaf</span>
              </div>
              <p style="font-size:0.78rem; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom:0.75rem">
                Verifier / extractor. Hits LLM directly. Returns result up the chain.
              </p>
              <div class="rdepth-pills">
                <span class="pill active">Python REPL</span>
                <span class="pill">llm_query() → direct</span>
                <span class="pill active">FINAL()</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>


<!-- ─── Features ──────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<section id="features">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-header">
      <span class="label">What you get</span>
      <h2>Built for the<br>hard problems.</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="features-grid">

      <div class="feature-card reveal">
        <div class="feature-icon cyan">⟳</div>
        <h3>True Recursive Reasoning</h3>
        <p>
          Not chain-of-thought. Not tool calls.
          <strong>Full sub-agents at every depth level</strong>, each with its own sandbox and decision loop.
          Inspired by divide-and-conquer algorithms — for reasoning.
        </p>
        <span class="feature-tag">rlm · depth</span>
      </div>

      <div class="feature-card reveal reveal-delay-1">
        <div class="feature-icon green">⬡</div>
        <h3>Sandboxed Python REPL</h3>
        <p>
          Code runs in <strong>ouros</strong> — an isolated Python environment.
          No filesystem. No network. No surprises. Variables persist across iterations.
          The model thinks in code; the sandbox keeps it honest.
        </p>
        <span class="feature-tag">ouros · sandbox</span>
      </div>

      <div class="feature-card reveal reveal-delay-2">
        <div class="feature-icon amber">⑂</div>
        <h3>Checkpoint & Fork</h3>
        <p>
          Branch your reasoning like git branches your code.
          <strong>CHECKPOINT_CREATE()</strong> snapshots sandbox state.
          <strong>FORK_CREATE()</strong> spawns parallel hypothesis paths.
          <strong>STRATEGY_COMMIT()</strong> picks the winner. Science, not vibes.
        </p>
        <span class="feature-tag">hypothesis · branching</span>
      </div>

      <div class="feature-card reveal">
        <div class="feature-icon" style="color:#a29bfe">◫</div>
        <h3>Virtual Filesystem</h3>
        <p>
          A model-visible scratchpad: <strong>/plans/</strong> for strategy,
          <strong>/evidence/</strong> for extracted facts,
          <strong>/artifacts/</strong> for generated work.
          Think of it as version control for the model's reasoning process.
        </p>
        <span class="feature-tag">vfs · artifacts</span>
      </div>

      <div class="feature-card reveal reveal-delay-1">
        <div class="feature-icon rust">⬡</div>
        <h3>Multi-Provider Routing</h3>
        <p>
          OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, xAI, Ollama.
          <strong>One engine to route them all.</strong>
          Auto-detects provider from model name prefix.
          Swap models without rewriting your workflow.
        </p>
        <span class="feature-tag">openai · claude · gemini · grok</span>
      </div>

      <div class="feature-card reveal reveal-delay-2">
        <div class="feature-icon" style="color:#e84855">◈</div>
        <h3>MCP Integration</h3>
        <p>
          Native <strong>Model Context Protocol</strong> server.
          Use Axon as a tool inside Claude Code, any MCP-compatible agent,
          or your own agentic workflow. Recursive reasoning as a service.
        </p>
        <span class="feature-tag">mcp · claude-code</span>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>


<!-- ─── Benchmarks ────────────────────────────────────────── -->

    <div class="bench-insight reveal">
      <div class="insight-icon">⚗️</div>

        <strong>Science corner:</strong> These benchmarks use 12+ task suites covering cognitive traps,
        state tracking, multi-step reasoning, and long-context distributional tasks.
        We show confidence intervals because <strong>n=15 isn't a proof — it's a hypothesis</strong>.
        Codeforces-hard tasks still show 0% across all modes. We report that too.

<!-- ─── Quick start ───────────────────────────────────────── -->
<section id="start">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="start-grid">
      <div class="start-text">
        <span class="label">Quick start</span>
        <h2>Up and running<br>in 60 seconds.</h2>
        <p>
          Build from source with Cargo. Set your API key. Pick a model.
          Axon takes care of the rest — recursion, sandboxing, context management.
        </p>
        <p>
          Need Claude Code integration? The MCP server is built in.
          Just configure the tool path and you're orchestrating recursive agents
          from inside your editor.
        </p>
        <div style="margin-top: 2rem; padding: 1rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--muted);">
          <div style="color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.8rem;">Requirements</div>
          <div>Rust 1.75+</div>
          <div>Python 3.9+ (for sandboxing)</div>
          <div>API key for your preferred provider</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="code-block">
          <div class="code-tabs">
            <span class="code-tab active" data-tab="install">install</span>
            <span class="code-tab" data-tab="basic">basic usage</span>
            <span class="code-tab" data-tab="advanced">advanced</span>
            <span class="code-tab" data-tab="mcp">mcp setup</span>
          </div>
          <div class="code-pane active" id="pane-install">
            <div class="code-block-header">
              <span class="code-block-lang">shell</span>
              <button class="code-block-copy" onclick="copyCode('install')">copy</button>
            </div>
            <pre id="code-install"><span class="cmt"># clone and build</span>
git clone https://github.com/Diogenesoftoronto/axon
cd axon
cargo build --release

<span class="cmt"># set your API key</span>
export OPENAI_API_KEY=<span class="str">"sk-..."</span>
<span class="cmt"># or Anthropic</span>
export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=<span class="str">"sk-ant-..."</span>
<span class="cmt"># or Google</span>
export GEMINI_API_KEY=<span class="str">"AIza..."</span></pre>
          </div>
          <div class="code-pane" id="pane-basic">
            <div class="code-block-header">
              <span class="code-block-lang">shell</span>
              <button class="code-block-copy" onclick="copyCode('basic')">copy</button>
            </div>
            <pre id="code-basic"><span class="cmt"># run a one-shot query with recursion depth 2</span>
./target/release/axon run \
  <span class="flag">--model</span> <span class="val">claude-sonnet-4</span> \
  <span class="flag">--max-depth</span> <span class="val">2</span> \
  <span class="flag">--query</span> <span class="str">"Analyze this document..."</span>

<span class="cmt"># interactive chat mode with thread persistence</span>
./target/release/axon chat \
  <span class="flag">--model</span> <span class="val">gemini-2.0-flash</span> \
  <span class="flag">--thread</span> <span class="val">my-project</span>

<span class="cmt"># upload context from file</span>
./target/release/axon upload \
  <span class="flag">--thread</span> <span class="val">my-project</span> \
  <span class="flag">--file</span> <span class="val">big-doc.txt</span></pre>
          </div>
          <div class="code-pane" id="pane-advanced">
            <div class="code-block-header">
              <span class="code-block-lang">shell</span>
              <button class="code-block-copy" onclick="copyCode('advanced')">copy</button>
            </div>
            <pre id="code-advanced"><span class="cmt"># deep recursion with strict depth enforcement</span>
axon run \
  <span class="flag">--model</span> <span class="val">gpt-4o</span> \
  <span class="flag">--max-depth</span> <span class="val">4</span> \
  <span class="flag">--depth-enforcement</span> <span class="val">strict</span> \
  <span class="flag">--require-min-recursive-calls</span> <span class="val">3</span> \
  <span class="flag">--query</span> <span class="str">"..."</span>

<span class="cmt"># enable checkpoints, forks, and VFS</span>
axon run \
  <span class="flag">--enable-checkpoints</span> \
  <span class="flag">--enable-forks</span> \
  <span class="flag">--enable-vfs</span> \
  <span class="flag">--max-iterations</span> <span class="val">20</span> \
  <span class="flag">--model</span> <span class="val">claude-sonnet-4</span> \
  <span class="flag">--query</span> <span class="str">"..."</span>

<span class="cmt"># verbose mode — see every thought</span>
axon run <span class="flag">--verbose</span> <span class="flag">--model</span> <span class="val">gemini-flash</span> <span class="flag">--query</span> <span class="str">"..."</span></pre>
          </div>
          <div class="code-pane" id="pane-mcp">
            <div class="code-block-header">
              <span class="code-block-lang">json</span>
              <button class="code-block-copy" onclick="copyCode('mcp')">copy</button>
            </div>
            <pre id="code-mcp"><span class="cmt">// .claude/settings.json — Claude Code integration</span>
{
  <span class="kw">"mcpServers"</span>: {
    <span class="kw">"axon"</span>: {
      <span class="kw">"command"</span>: <span class="str">"/path/to/axon"</span>,
      <span class="kw">"args"</span>: [<span class="str">"mcp"</span>],
      <span class="kw">"env"</span>: {
        <span class="kw">"ANTHROPIC_API_KEY"</span>: <span class="str">"sk-ant-..."</span>
      }
    }
  }
}</pre>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>


<!-- ─── Quote ─────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<section id="quote">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="quote-text reveal">
      "The system knows itself. The loop is <em>strange</em>. The answer emerges."
    </div>
    <div class="quote-attr reveal reveal-delay-1">
      - inspired by Douglas Hofstadter, <em>Gödel, Escher, Bach</em> (1979) · and now, Axon (2025)
    </div>
  </div>
</section>


<!-- ─── Footer ────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-inner">
    <div>
      <div class="footer-logo">axon</div>
      <div class="footer-byline">Recursive Language Model Engine · Open Source</div>
    </div>
    <ul class="footer-links">
      <li><a href="https://github.com/Diogenesoftoronto/axon">GitHub</a></li>
      <li><a href="changelog.html">Changelog</a></li>
      <li><a href="https://github.com/Diogenesoftoronto/axon/tree/main/docs">Docs</a></li>
      <li><a href="https://github.com/Diogenesoftoronto/axon/tree/main/benchmarks">Benchmarks</a></li>
      <li><a href="https://github.com/Diogenesoftoronto/axon/blob/main/README.md">README</a></li>
      <li><a href="/paper.pdf">Paper</a></li>
    </ul>
    <div class="footer-rust">
      <span>🦀</span>
      <span>Written in Rust</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</footer>


<script>
  /* ─── Terminal animation ────────────────────────────────── */
  const lines = [
    { text: '$ axon run --model claude-sonnet-4 --max-depth 3 \\', cls: 't-cmd' },
    { text: '    --query "trace the causal chain across this corpus"', cls: 't-cmd' },
    { text: '', cls: 't-blank' },
    { text: '[depth:0] Context received. 47,293 tokens.', cls: 't-d0' },
    { text: '[depth:0] Strategy: divide → delegate → aggregate.', cls: 't-d0' },
    { text: '[depth:0] Spawning sub-agents for each chunk...', cls: 't-spawn' },
    { text: '', cls: 't-blank' },
    { text: '  [depth:1] Scanning chunk A (11,204 tokens)', cls: 't-d1' },
    { text: '  [depth:1] Found 3 candidate claims. Verifying...', cls: 't-d1' },
    { text: '  [depth:1] Spawning verifier...', cls: 't-spawn' },
    { text: '    [depth:2] Extracting evidence for claim #2...', cls: 't-d2' },
    { text: '    [depth:2] ✓ FINAL: "Claim confirmed. Confidence: 0.91"', cls: 't-final' },
    { text: '  [depth:1] ✓ FINAL: "3 claims verified, 1 rejected"', cls: 't-final' },
    { text: '', cls: 't-blank' },
    { text: '  [depth:1] Scanning chunk B (14,887 tokens)', cls: 't-d1' },
    { text: '  [depth:1] ✓ FINAL: "No causal links in this section"', cls: 't-final' },
    { text: '', cls: 't-blank' },
    { text: '[depth:0] Aggregating results from 2 sub-agents...', cls: 't-d0' },
    { text: '[depth:0] ✓ FINAL: "Causal chain identified across 4 events."', cls: 't-final' },
    { text: '', cls: 't-blank' },
    { text: 'depth_max=2 · calls=3 · tokens=9,847 · time=5.1s', cls: 't-stats' },
  ];

  let lineIndex = 0;
  let charIndex = 0;
  let currentSpan = null;
  const body = document.getElementById('terminal-body');
  const cursor = document.getElementById('terminal-cursor');

  function getDelay(cls) {
    if (cls === 't-blank') return 180;
    return 22 + Math.random() * 18;
  }

  function nextLine() {
    if (lineIndex >= lines.length) {
      body.appendChild(cursor);
      return;
    }
    const { text, cls } = lines[lineIndex];
    lineIndex++;
    charIndex = 0;
    if (text === '') {
      const blank = document.createElement('span');
      blank.className = 't-line t-blank';
      blank.textContent = '\u00a0';
      body.appendChild(blank);
      setTimeout(nextLine, 180);
      return;
    }
    currentSpan = document.createElement('span');
    currentSpan.className = 't-line ' + cls;
    body.appendChild(currentSpan);
    body.appendChild(cursor);
    typeChar(text, cls);
  }

  function typeChar(text, cls) {
    if (charIndex >= text.length) {
      setTimeout(nextLine, cls === 't-cmd' ? 80 : 40);
      return;
    }
    currentSpan.textContent = text.slice(0, charIndex + 1);
    charIndex++;
    setTimeout(() => typeChar(text, cls), getDelay(cls));
  }

  setTimeout(nextLine, 600);


  /* ─── Scroll reveal ─────────────────────────────────────── */
  const revealObs = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(e => {
      if (e.isIntersecting) {
        e.target.classList.add('visible');
        revealObs.unobserve(e.target);
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.12 });

  document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => revealObs.observe(el));


  /* ─── Step reveal ────────────────────────────────────────── */
  const stepObs = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(e => {
      if (e.isIntersecting) {
        e.target.classList.add('visible');
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.3 });
  document.querySelectorAll('.step').forEach(el => stepObs.observe(el));


  /* ─── Recursion diagram reveal ──────────────────────────── */
  const rdObs = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(e => {
      if (e.isIntersecting) {
        const rd0 = document.getElementById('rd0');
        const rd1 = document.getElementById('rd1');
        const rd2 = document.getElementById('rd2');
        setTimeout(() => rd0 && rd0.classList.add('visible'), 100);
        setTimeout(() => rd1 && rd1.classList.add('visible'), 600);
        setTimeout(() => rd2 && rd2.classList.add('visible'), 1100);
        rdObs.disconnect();
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.2 });
  const rdContainer = document.getElementById('rdepth-container');
  if (rdContainer) rdObs.observe(rdContainer);


  /* ─── Benchmark bar animation ────────────────────────────── */
  const barObs = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(e => {
      if (e.isIntersecting) {
        e.target.querySelectorAll('.bench-animate').forEach(bar => {
          const w = bar.dataset.width;
          setTimeout(() => { bar.style.width = w + '%'; }, 200);
        });
        barObs.unobserve(e.target);
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.3 });
  document.querySelectorAll('.bench-card').forEach(el => barObs.observe(el));


  /* ─── Code tabs ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  document.querySelectorAll('.code-tab').forEach(tab => {
    tab.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const tabId = tab.dataset.tab;
      document.querySelectorAll('.code-tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
      document.querySelectorAll('.code-pane').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
      tab.classList.add('active');
      const pane = document.getElementById('pane-' + tabId);
      if (pane) pane.classList.add('active');
    });
  });


  /* ─── Copy code ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  function copyCode(tabId) {
    const pre = document.getElementById('code-' + tabId);
    if (!pre) return;
    const text = pre.innerText;
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(text).then(() => {
      const btn = pre.closest('.code-block').querySelector('.code-block-copy');
      if (btn) {
        btn.textContent = 'copied!';
        setTimeout(() => { btn.textContent = 'copy'; }, 2000);
      }
    });
  }
</script>
</body>
</html>

response.output:
axon Back to Home

Changelog

// Tracking the evolution of recursive reasoning.

April 25, 2026

OpenAI-Compatible Server and Lock-Free Registry

Today we are shipping a major architectural upgrade that makes Axon a drop-in replacement for standard LLM providers. By exposing an OpenAI-compatible API, you can now point your favorite agentic tools (like OpenCode or Codex) directly at an Axon instance.

  • OpenAI-Compatible Server: New serve-openai command starts an HTTP server supporting /v1/chat/completions and /v1/responses.
  • Lock-Free Tool Registry: Migrated from standard Mutex locks to an ArcSwap pattern for tool lookups. This allows high-concurrency environments to read the toolset without any contention.
  • Extensible Tool Injection: Use the configure_tools MCP tool or API to register custom functions that the RLM sandbox can invoke during reasoning.
  • RlmService Refactoring: Unified the core reasoning engine into a standalone service, ensuring consistent behavior across CLI, MCP, and HTTP interfaces.
  • Model Overrides: Specify the model and sub-model per-query rather than being locked to global defaults.
Performance Benchmark Results

Testing registry read latency under load (100 concurrent users, 1,000 reads each):

113.8ms
Standard Mutex Locking
18.3ms
Lock-Free ArcSwap

Finding: The move to lock-free reads resulted in a 6x speedup for high-concurrency tool lookups.

March 1, 2026

Initial Release

Axon RLM engine is officially open source. Featuring recursive depth management, sandboxed Python REPLs, and a persistent context store.

© 2026 Axon Project · Recursive reasoning for everyone.
